---
title: "Antidepressant care sites"
author: "Allie Lake"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: united
    toc_depth: 4
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pacman::p_load(data.table, dplyr, ggplot2, PheWAS, openxlsx, foreach, ggthemr, ggrepel, RColorBrewer)
options(scipen=999)

ggthemr_reset()
```

## Load data
```{r}
map <- fread("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/CareSiteMap_Multispecialty_Long_UPDATED_092424.csv")
care_site_names <- read.xlsx("/data/davis_lab/allie/care_sites/output/CareSite_VisitDetailCount_UPDATED_092424.xlsx") %>%
  select(care_site_id, care_site_name) %>% 
  data.table() %>% 
  unique()

map <- merge(map, care_site_names, by = "care_site_id")
```

```{r}
meds <- fread("/data/davis_lab/sealockj/projects/mdd_wbc_long/ad_response/add_antipsychotics/sd_pull_20230607/ad_response/sd_wide_antidepressants_merged_xtable_dbc_from_20230607_pull.csv")
```
